scheme_name: Gadiya Lohar Raw Material Purchase Grant-in-aid Scheme
page_title: Gadiya Lohar Raw Material Purchase Grant-in-aid Scheme

details: The scheme "Gadiya Lohar Raw Material Purchase Grant-in-Aid Scheme" was introduced by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Government of Rajasthan. Under this scheme, the state government provides a one-time financial assistance of ₹10,000/- to the Gadia Lohar community of Rajasthan for purchasing raw materials, helping them become self-reliant in their business.
benefits: Under this scheme, the member of Gadia Lohar community of Rajasthan receives a one-time financial grant of ₹10,000/- to purchase raw materials for their business.
eligibility: The applicant should be a native of Rajasthan.
The applicant should belong to the Gadiya Lohar community.

offline: The interested applicant should visit (during office hours) the District Social Welfare Office and request a hard copy of the prescribed format of the application form from the staff exclusively entrusted to issue and collect filled-in applications.
In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required).
Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents to the District Social Welfare Office.

Request a receipt or acknowledgment from the District Social Welfare Office to whom the application has been submitted. Ensure that the receipt contains essential details such as the date and time of submission and a unique identification number (if applicable).
The applicant must submit a utilization certificate within 3 months.

faqs.question: Who can apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Individuals belonging to the Gadiya Lohar community can apply.

faqs.question: How much financial assistance is provided under this scheme?
faqs.answer: The eligible applicant will receive ₹10,000 as a grant.

faqs.question: How is the amount disbursed?
faqs.answer: The grant is approved and disbursed by the District Social Welfare Officer.

faqs.question: How often can I receive this grant?
faqs.answer: It is a one-time financial assistance.

faqs.question: What happens if I misuse the grant?
faqs.answer: The amount will be recovered, and legal action may be taken against the beneficiary.

faqs.question: Is there a deadline to use the grant?
faqs.answer: Yes, the grant must be utilized within 3 months, and a utilization certificate must be submitted.

faqs.question: Can I apply online?
faqs.answer: No, applications must be submitted physically at the District Social Welfare Office.

faqs.question: What is the role of the District Social Welfare Officer in this scheme?
faqs.answer: The officer reviews applications, approves grants, and ensures proper utilization.

faqs.question: How can I apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: The applicant need to fill out the application form and submit it to the District Social Welfare Officer along with the required documents.

faqs.question: Is there an income limit to apply under the Scheme?
faqs.answer: No, the income limit is not mentioned in the scheme.

faqs.question: Can I use the grant for purposes other than purchasing raw materials?
faqs.answer: No, the grant must be used only for raw material purchases related to the trade.
